summary: Completed testing of Express Affiliation Wizard feature. Backend API (GET /api/hotmart/express-wizard) fully functional with 29/29 tests passing. Frontend wizard modal working correctly with all required UI elements and data-testid attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: Express Wizard API correctly returns opportunities sorted by priority_score DESC
Brazil URLs correctly use 'pt-br' locale, Spanish countries use 'es' locale

All required data-testid attributes present: open-wizard-btn, express-wizard-overlay, express-wizard-panel, close-wizard-btn, opportunity-row-{i}, opportunity-checkbox-{i}, open-opportunity-{i}, open-all-btn, sync-wizard-btn, reopen-btn
TOP 5 opportunities preselected by default as specified
Wizard button correctly disabled when Hotmart connection.status !== 'ok'
Stepper UI shows 3 steps: Selecciona, Afíliate, Sincroniza
test_credentials: Hotmart credentials in backend/.env with valid scopes. Connection returns status:ok.
seed_data_creation: None - uses existing trends data from Module 1 research
context_for_next_testing_agent: Express Affiliation Wizard is fully functional. New endpoint: GET /api/hotmart/express-wizard?per_country=2&max_total=10 returns opportunities with Hotmart search URLs. Frontend modal (ExpressAffiliationWizard.jsx) integrated into HotmartAccountPanel.jsx. Wizard button disabled when Hotmart not connected. Note: In headless browser testing, window.open calls may be blocked by popup blocker - this is expected browser behavior, not a bug. The step transitions (1→2→3) work correctly when tabs are opened.

tests: HotmartAccountPanel renders with 'Mi cuenta Hotmart' section - PASSED

'Abrir las N seleccionadas' button (data-testid='open-all-btn') present - PASSED
Stepper shows 3 steps: Selecciona, Afíliate, Sincroniza - PASSED
Footer shows selection counter (N de M seleccionadas) - PASSED

express_wizard_validations.filtering: Only Alta and Media commercial_intent included (Baja filtered)
